pr.title: WIP: 1.1xxx BPB - MDL-T Stack (LeakyReLU² + EMA + GPTQ-lite + LateQAT + warmdown3500 + int6+zstd-22)

output.summary: Combines MDL-T regularizer pulling weights to int6 grid with LeakyReLU², EMA smoothing, GPTQ-lite clip search, and late int6 QAT for compression-aware training.
techniques: MDL-T regularizer aligning weights with int6 gridpoints during extended warmdown
LeakyReLU(0.5)² MLP plus EMA smoothing to stabilize late training
Late int6 QAT with GPTQ-lite clipping and zstd-22 compression
